Be My AI:Maltodextrin is a white powder made from starches such as corn, rice, potato, or wheat. It is commonly used as a food additive to improve texture, thicken products, or as a filler to increase the volume of processed foods. Maltodextrin is easily digestible and quickly absorbed by the body, providing a rapid source of energy. It is often found in products like snacks, desserts, and sports drinks. While generally considered safe, it can affect blood sugar levels, so individuals with diabetes or those monitoring their carbohydrate intake may want to be cautious.
